patches.general_rule: A baseline aggregate may be compared only when its immutable TOP1/TOP2 vectors, answer literal-replay object, scorer version and hashes resolve to the same run. Conflicting legacy reports remain read-only and are never silently selected or overwritten.

Compile every option from literal text into actor, action/state, object, reference period, continuity/frequency, magnitude and formal endpoint atoms. No diagnostic, disease, occupation, relationship or temporal term may be replaced by a different category.

Each father, mother, spouse, partner, child, sibling and caregiver receives a distinct natural-person identity and person-taiji route. A kinship palace or ten-god role cannot complete that person's health, death, work, marriage or action endpoint.

Materialize one option-neutral S10/S15 time fact per actual candidate calendar coordinate and legal Bazi version before option projection; apply equal fields and equal burden to all candidate years and adjacent stages.

Preserve direct support, partial support, limitation and direct counterevidence independently from exact endpoint gaps. Propensity and opportunity never become actual occurrence or formal endpoint, but missing exactness cannot erase directional evidence.

Generate exactly N(N-1)/2 pairwise rows and enforce the S18 decision order. A contradicted option cannot defeat a partially supported option through frozen wording, source count or narrative similarity. TOP1/TOP2 must be mechanically derived from the matrix.

When source artifacts disagree on the four pillars or day-boundary result, create legal parallel versions only when mechanically supportable; otherwise quarantine the Bazi track. Never select a version by answer fit, and never fuse an invalid Bazi seal.

Require each Ziwei mechanism to bind S05-S10 native parents and each Bazi mechanism to bind S11-S16 native parents. Shared S01/S02/S04/S17/S18 objects cannot replace native parents; S03 runs only after two machine-valid local seals.

Derive confidence from the closest pairwise margin, material contradicted atoms, unresolved exact endpoints, version conflicts and seal validity. Source count, track agreement and story fluency add zero confidence by themselves.

Keep original predictions immutable. Store all answer-visible reconstruction under SHADOW_REBUILD with a new RUN_ID, and label same-case scoring TRAINING_REGRESSION_SCORE. It cannot promote formal validity or generalization.
